title: Keep local Announce out of remote state
description: Make send_announce validate the local signed Announce and transmit it without processing it into the remote AnnounceProcessor.
acceptance_criteria: Sending a local Announce has no remote table insertion or eviction side effects, including at capacity.
close_reason: send_announce now validates and transmits without processing local identity; reflected local Announces are rejected without remote state. Added full-capacity no-insertion/no-eviction regression and verified three-node flow.
